---
title: "Dataset Expansion Labs"
---

This section scaffolds additional worked examples beyond `lalonde`.

## Roadmap-Aligned Labs

| Lab | Dataset(s) | Current status | Link |
|---|---|---|---|
| Black Politicians Lab | `causaldata::black_politicians` | Scaffolded | [Open](black_politicians_lab.qmd) |
| NSW + CPS Benchmark Lab | `causaldata::nsw_mixtape`, `causaldata::cps_mixtape` | Scaffolded | [Open](nsw_cps_benchmark_lab.qmd) |
| Titanic Teaching Lab | `causaldata::titanic` | Scaffolded | [Open](titanic_teaching_lab.qmd) |
| Data Acquisition Lab | `causaldata` dependency and ingest workflow | Scaffolded | [Open](data_acquisition_lab.qmd) |

## How To Use These Pages

1. Keep each lab as a self-contained design notebook.
2. Reuse a common diagnostics structure from the main report.
3. Promote completed labs into the main article when ready.
